opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I haven't had a period in ten years, but tonight I suddenly started gushing blood with large clots, and my lower stomach is cramping terribly. I'm too scared to stand up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The bleeding came on all of a sudden tonight and it's really heavy with clots and bad cramping — I don't know what to do and I'm on my own.

symptom_narrative.onset: abrupt onset tonight; had noticed some minor pink-tinged spotting on the toilet paper on and off over the past 3 weeks and dismissed it
symptom_narrative.duration: the heavy bleeding started a few hours ago and hasn't settled
symptom_narrative.character: heavy bright red bleeding with large dark clots, plus deep cramping pain low in the belly
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: soaking a large pad about every half hour; it feels like it's gushing when I move
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: coming from down below, with cramping across my lower stomach
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting or lying still seems to slow it a bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up makes it feel like it gushes
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've felt really drained and worn out for the last month; my heart feels like it's pounding and racing tonight
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: none since menopause — I went through the change about ten to twelve years ago and haven't bled since
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: too frightened to stand or walk to the door; sitting on towels on the couch

past_medical_history.how_managed: diet, not on any weight medication

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: went through menopause about 10-12 years ago and has not had any bleeding since, until tonight

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; no one else at home tonight; worried about falling if she gets dizzy standing up

objective_data_offered.value: my heart feels like it's pounding and racing, I didn't count it but it feels very fast
objective_data_offered.timing: tonight, since the bleeding got heavy
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's subjective sensation of a fast heartbeat, not a counted or device-measured rate

objective_data_offered.value: I've soaked through a large pad about every 30 minutes and there are big clots; the towels on the couch are soaked
objective_data_offered.timing: over the last couple of hours
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own estimate of blood loss; cannot be objectively quantified over telehealth

objective_data_offered.value: I feel really pale and washed out and a bit clammy
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-described appearance; not a clinician assessment of pallor or perfusion
